BASE.name: ATTACK_VECTOR
BASE.justification: The issue can be exploited remotely because weak hash algorithms like md5/sha1 used.

BASE.name: ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
BASE.justification: No special conditions are required to exploit this issue.

BASE.name: SCOPE
BASE.justification: The impact is limited to the same application scope.

BASE.name: CONFIDENTIALITY
BASE.justification: Vulnerability does not expose data but allows data forgery.

BASE.name: INTEGRITY
BASE.justification: Entire trust in data integrity can be subverted.

BASE.name: AVAILABILITY
BASE.justification: No direct impact on system uptime or service availability.

TEMPORAL.name: EXPLOIT_CODE_MATURITY
TEMPORAL.justification: The issue is well known and demonstrable.

TEMPORAL.name: REPORT_CONFIDENCE
TEMPORAL.justification: The issue is clearly identified by static analysis.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: The attacker doesn’t need special privileges to exploit the hash weakness.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_CONFIDENTIALITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Vulnerability does not expose data but allows data forgery.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_INTEGRITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Entire trust in data integrity can be subverted.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_AVAILABILITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: No direct impact on system uptime or service availability.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: CONFIDENTIALITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Integrity is critical, confidentiality less so in this context.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: INTEGRITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Integrity of hashed data is paramount (e.g., digital signatures, verification).

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: AVAILABILITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Availability not relevant to the threat.
